creations.name: Pawan Washudev
creations.shortDescription: Personalized AI-powered study companion that adapts to your learning style.
creations.detailDescription: AI Study Mentor is a personalized learning assistant that creates adaptive study plans, tracks progress, and provides actionable insights. It helps students stay organized and motivated while optimizing their study time.

creations.name: SmartInventory Pro
creations.shortDescription: AI-powered inventory management with forecasting and automated reordering.
creations.detailDescription: SmartInventory Pro uses predictive analytics to forecast demand, optimize stock levels, and automate reorders, helping businesses reduce waste and avoid stockouts.

creations.name: ContentCraft AI
creations.shortDescription: Generate, edit, and optimize content while preserving your brand voice.
creations.detailDescription: ContentCraft AI helps teams create high-quality content across formats, ensuring consistency, SEO optimization, and streamlined workflows.
